rules.rule_text:
rule bunny_code
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a1 = "ATTACKMODE"
		$a2 = "QUACK"
		$a3 = "ECM_ETHERNET"
		$a4 = "RNDIS_ETHERNET"
		$a5 = "LED"
		$a6 = "GET SWITCH_POSITION"
		$a7 = "REQUIRETOOL"

	condition:
		4 of them
}
